Design System v0.7.3
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Data Display

Chart Container

Library-agnostischer Frame für Daten-Visualisierungen. Konsument bringt das Rendering mit (SVG inline, Canvas, Chart.js, D3, Recharts, Observable Plot, etc.). Das DS liefert:

  • Container-Komposition (Header, Body, Legend, Source)
  • Kategorische Color-Palette (--chart-1 .. -8) via Okabe-Ito (Color-Blind-Safe, Cell Press / academic gold standard)
  • Semantic-Aliases (--chart-positive/-negative/-neutral)

Die Palette ist tone-agnostisch (gleich in allen Themes) und mode-aware durch Overrides in dark.css.

Beispiele

HTML anzeigen 
<figure class="chart">
  <figcaption class="chart__header">
    <div>
      <h3 class="chart__title">Umsatz Q1</h3>
      <p class="chart__subtitle">CHF, monatlich</p>
    </div>
    <span class="chart__trend chart__trend--positive">+12.4%</span>
  </figcaption>
  <div class="chart__body">
    <!-- Konsument-SVG, Canvas, Library-Output -->
  </div>
  <ul class="chart__legend">
    <li><span class="chart__swatch" style="--swatch: var(--chart-1)"></span> Umsatz</li>
    <li><span class="chart__swatch" style="--swatch: var(--chart-3)"></span> Buchungen</li>
  </ul>
  <p class="chart__source">Stand: 14:32 · Buchungssystem</p>
</figure>

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--chart-bg Optional —
--chart-border Optional —
--chart-radius Optional —
--chart-padding Optional —
Source-CSS ansehen
